channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 12: service obstruction False Parker
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 28.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 28.05.2026]

item.title: 10A/37A/40A: construction works
item.description: Because of construction works in the Max-Emanuel-Straße, Peter-Jordan-Straße and Dänenstraße ranges, the lines 10A, 37A and 40A are redirected. [Since 28.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Max-Emanuel-Straße, Peter-Jordan-Straße and Dänenstraße ranges, the lines 10A, 37A and 40A are redirected.
[Since 28.05.2026]

item.title: Wien Meidling ↔ Baden
item.description: Due to construction works, between Wien Meidling train station and Baden b.Vienna train station from 08.06.2026 to 03.07.2026 some local trains with changed travel times. [Since 28.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, between Wien Meidling train station and Baden b.Vienna train station from 08.06.2026 to 03.07.2026 some local trains with changed travel times.
[Since 28.05.2026]

item.title: 63A: crane works from 01 June 2026
item.description: Because of crane works in the Kerschensteinergasse range between Kundratstraße and Längenfeldgasse, the 63A line is redirected. [01.06.2026 – 11.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of crane works in the Kerschensteinergasse range between Kundratstraße and Längenfeldgasse, the 63A line is redirected.
[01.06.2026 – 11.06.2026]

item.title: Wien Stadlau ↔ Wien Simmering
item.description: Due to a fire brigade operation, no journeys are possible between Wien Stadlau Bahnhst (U) and Wien Simmering Bahnhof (U). [Since 28.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to a fire brigade operation, no journeys are possible between Wien Stadlau Bahnhst (U) and Wien Simmering Bahnhof (U).
[Since 28.05.2026]

item.title: Wien Hauptbahnhof ↔ Gramatneusiedl
item.description: construction works allows between Vienna Hbf (U) and Gramatneusiedl station from 31.10.2026 to 30.11.2026 … [Since 27.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
construction works allows between Vienna Hbf (U) and Gramatneusiedl station from 31.10.2026 to 30.11.2026 …
[Since 27.05.2026]

item.title: N46: Thaliastraße U
item.description: Stop change of line N46 towards Otto-Wagner-Areal Stop: Thaliastraße U From: Lerchenfelder Belt under U6 To: Kaiserstraße 106 Duration: 02 June … [26.05.2026 – 26.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of line N46 towards Otto-Wagner-Areal Stop: Thaliastraße U From: Lerchenfelder Belt under U6 To: Kaiserstraße 106 Duration: 02 June …
[26.05.2026 – 26.06.2026]

item.title: 5: False Parker service from Albertgasse
item.description: Operation only between Praterstern S U and Blindengasse. [On 28.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Operation only between Praterstern S U and Blindengasse.
[On 28.05.2026]
